message:
fix(providers): separate multi-block assistant text with double newlines

When converting assistant messages for Azure and OpenAI, multiple
ContentBlock::Text entries were collected via `.collect::<String>()`
which concatenated them without any separator. This produced garbled
text when the model returned multiple text blocks.

Switch to `.collect::<Vec<_>>().join("\n\n")` so each block is
separated by a paragraph break, preserving readability and matching
the original message structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
